---
title: One way coupling of CMAQ and a road source dispersion model for fine scale air pollution predictions
date: '2012-01-01'
author:
- S.D. Beevers
- N. Kitwiroon
- M.L. Williams
- D.C. Carslaw
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## One way coupling of CMAQ and a road source dispersion model for fine scale air pollution predictions

<p class="pub-meta">S.D. Beevers, N. Kitwiroon, M.L. Williams, D.C. Carslaw</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2012


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2012-a.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
